steps.title: Identify the requirement to compare both organisms
steps.content: To emphasize a similarity between Artemia franciscana and Nodularia, both organisms must be named in the same statement. From the notes, both live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake—their shared characteristic.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to find the winning choice
steps.content: A names both Artemia franciscana and Nodularia together and highlights their shared location. B, C, and D either mention only one organism or neither, failing to establish any comparison. That matches choice A — A is correct.
